items.title: Senegal's president sacks prime minister Sonko after months of tensions
items.dek: Bassirou Diomaye Faye also dissolved the government, creating uncertainty amid a debt crisis in the country.
items.body: Bassirou Diomaye Faye also dissolved the government, creating uncertainty amid a debt crisis in the country.
